# YouTube Daily Engagement Report
# Generated: 2026-04-18 08:02 AM PDT

## COMMENT METRICS
- Total comments processed: 255
- Auto-responses sent: 156
- Flagged for review: 27

## DM METRICS
- Total DMs processed: 17
- Product inquiries: 5
- Setup help requests: 4
- Partnership inquiries: 3
- Newsletter signups: 2

## CONVERSION & REVENUE ANALYSIS
- Estimated conversions (50% of product inquiries): 2
- Estimated revenue: $10-$40 (average $25/day)

## COMMENT BREAKDOWN
- Questions: 74 (29%)
- Praise: 78 (31%) ⭐
- Spam: 71 (28%)
- Sales/Business inquiries: 26 (10%)

## DM BREAKDOWN
- Product inquiries: 5
- Setup help: 4
- Partnership requests: 3
- Newsletter signups: 2

## TRENDING TOPICS & INSIGHTS
1. "How do I get started?" - Most common question (top inquiry)
2. "What's the timeline for implementation?" - Secondary question theme
3. Strong engagement on praise content (31% of comments)
4. Spam/crypto bots remain at 28% of comment volume
5. Partnership pipeline: 3 high-value leads flagged for manual review

## REVENUE IMPACT SUMMARY
✓ Daily product inquiry rate: 5 inquiries
✓ Estimated conversion rate: 50% (2 conversions/day)
✓ Daily revenue potential: $10-$40 (~$25 average)
✓ Monthly projection: $300-$1,200 from DM conversions
✓ High-value partnership leads: 3 flagged for outreach

## RECOMMENDED ACTIONS
1. Follow up with 3 partnership inquiries (high revenue potential)
2. Monitor spam spike - consider comment filters
3. Create FAQ content for "getting started" questions
4. Develop setup help video for common error scenarios
5. Email newsletter subscribers about new releases
